Slot — Scheduling & Cover

Participant

Device notifications

Turn on once per computer and browser (Mac or Windows). Each machine needs its own setup — mobile and desktop are separate.

Notifications

Late submission requests and activity alerts. On desktop, use Chrome or Edge if Safari does not show banners. The in-app bell still works while you are signed in.

In Arc or Chrome: click the lock icon in the address bar → Site settings → Notifications → Allow, then refresh this page.
